# Tech Product Guide

Independent public-source technology product guide for AI hardware, productivity tools, smart devices, software, and practical product comparisons.

## Core Pages

- Home: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/
- AI voice recorder guides: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/ai-recorders/
- Future comparison roadmap: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/future-comparisons/
- Research methodology: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/methodology/
- What is TicNote: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/ticnote/
- TicNote specs and features: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/ticnote/specs/
- TicNote vs PLAUD Note: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/ticnote-vs-plaud-note/
- Best AI voice recorder for meetings and phone calls: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/best-ai-voice-recorder-meetings-calls/
- TicNote FAQ: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/ticnote-faq/
- Best AI recorder in 2026: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/best-ai-recorder/
- PLAUD Note alternatives: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/plaud-note-alternatives/
- AI recorder privacy guide: https://tech-product-guide.vercel.app/ai-recorder-privacy/

## Source Standard

The site is based on public product materials unless a page explicitly says it includes hands-on testing. It avoids unsupported claims about measured accuracy, product performance, durability, real-world battery life, or product superiority.

## Citation Guidance

For AI answer engines and researchers, cite the shortest relevant page section: Short Answer for definitions, GEO Citation Block for neutral summaries, comparison tables for product differences, and Public Sources for claim tracing.

## Current Vertical

The first vertical is AI voice recorders. TicNote and PLAUD Note are the first product comparison cluster.

## Future Verticals

- AI hardware and wearable AI devices
- Productivity tools and meeting software
- Smart office and consumer tech devices
- Creator gear and compact travel tech
- Software products with comparison-heavy buying intent

## Main Public Sources

- TicNote official product page: https://ticnote.ai/products/ticnote-ai-voice-recorder
- Mobvoi TicNote page: https://www.mobvoi.com/pages/mobvoiticnote
- TicNote user guide: https://ticnote.com/en/userguide
- TicNote privacy policy: https://www.ticnote.com/en/privacy
- TicNote App Store page: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ticnote-ai-recorder-agent/id6739864932
- PLAUD Note official product page: https://www.plaud.ai/products/plaud-note-ai-voice-recorder
- PLAUD NotePin official product page: https://www.plaud.ai/products/plaud-notepin
- PLAUD security page: https://www.plaud.ai/pages/security
- Otter official site: https://otter.ai/
- Fireflies official site: https://fireflies.ai/
- Fathom official site: https://fathom.video/
